commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `api.runtime.llm.completeStructured(...)`, structured text/image input types, JSON/schema parsing, auth-profile policy wiring, context-engine parity, docs, tests, changelog, and SDK API baseline updates.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a proposed SDK/runtime feature, not a broken existing behavior report. Current-main source inspection shows only `runtime.llm.complete`, while PR head adds `completeStructured` and new config policy.
